zh.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Charde於1591年出生在英國。她於1610年9月2日與Aaron Cooke在英國英格蘭多瑟特可姆結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她於1630年移民到美國麻薩諸塞州素福爾可赫爾南塔斯可特 比奇並於1630年住在美國麻薩諸塞州素福爾可波斯頓多爾斯特。她去世於1643年4月18日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州溫莎女爵享年52歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德素斯 溫莎女爵。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Charde于1591年出生在英国。她于1610年9月2日与Aaron Cooke在英国英格兰多瑟特可姆结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她于1630年移民到美国马萨诸塞州素福爾可赫爾南塔斯可特 比奇并于1630年住在美国马萨诸塞州素福爾可波斯頓多爾斯特。她去世于1643年4月18日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州溫莎女爵享年52岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德素斯 溫莎女爵。

nameMeanings.name: Charde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southwestern): habitational name from Chard or South Chard in Somerset, recorded in Domesday Book as Cerdren, possibly from Old English ceart ‘rough heathland’ + ærn ‘building, dwelling’. In some instances the surname may have arisen simply as a topographic name from ceart.
In some cases possibly also French: from a shortened form of the personal name Richardon, a pet form of Richard , or a habitational name from Chard in Creuse.

variants.name: Richard
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Emile, Jacques, Andre, Marcel, Pierre, Leonce, Normand, Camille, Lucien, Gilles, Henri.

English, French, West Indian (mainly Haiti), German, and Dutch: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements rīc ‘power(ful)’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. The Middle English forms were Richard and Rikard, respectively Parisian Old French and Old Picard pronunciations of the ancient Germanic name. Middle English Rikard gives rise to the pet form Rick , whilst Richard has given the pet forms Richie and Rich . Both produced rhyming pet forms, Dick and Hick for Rikard and Hitch for Richard.

History: The LA Richard families are mainly descended from Acadian refugees in the second half of the 18th century. — This surname is listed in the register of Huguenot ancestors recognized by the Huguenot Society of America.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Charde was born in 1591, in England. She married Aaron Cooke on 2 September 1610, in Thorncombe, Dorset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She immigrated to Nantasket Beach, Hull, Suffolk, Massachusetts, United States in 1630 and lived in Dorchester, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, United States in 1630. She died on 18 April 1643, in Windsor, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 52, and was buried in South Windsor, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

Elle a immigré au Nantasket Beach, Hull, Suffolk, Massachusetts, États-Unis en 1630 et a vécu à Dorchester, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, États-Unis en 1630. it.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Charde è nata il nel 1591 nel England. Lei sposato Aaron Cooke il 2 settembre 1610, nel Thorncombe, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Immigrata nel Nantasket Beach, Hull, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1630 e vissuto a Dorchester, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1630. Morì il 18 aprile 1643, nel Windsor, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolta a South Windsor, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Chardeは1591年にイギリスで生まれた。1610年9月2日にイギリスイギリスドールセトソルンコンベでAaron Cookeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1630年にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州スフォルクハルナンタスケト ビーチに移住し，1630年にはアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州スフォルクボストンドールチェスターに住んでいた。彼女は1643年4月18日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ウィンドソルで52歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードソウス ウィンドソルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Charde(은)는 1591년 영국에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1610년 9월 2일 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 토른코브에서 Aaron Cooke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1630년에 미국 매사추세츠 주 수폴크 훌 난타스케트 비치로 이민을 떠났고, 1630년도에 미국 매사추세츠 주 수폴크 보스턴 도르체스터에서 살았다. 그녀는 1643년 4월 18일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 윈드소르에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 소우스 윈드소르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Charde nasceu em 1591, em Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com Aaron Cooke em 2 de setembro de 1610, em Thorncombe, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela imigrou para o Nantasket Beach, Hull, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América em 1630 e viveu em Dorchester, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América em 1630. Ela faleceu em 18 de abril de 1643, em Windsor, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 52 anos, e foi sepultada em South Windsor, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Charde родилась в 1591 г. в местности Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Aaron Cooke 2 сентября 1610 г. в местности таурнкомб, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она иммигрировала в нантаскет бич, хулл, суффолк, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты в 1630 году, а также жила в местности дорчестир, бостон, суффолк, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты в 1630 году. Она умерла 18 апреля 1643 г. в местности виндзор, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 52 лет и была похоронена в местности соут виндзор, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Charde nació en 1591, en Inglaterra. Se casó con Aaron Cooke el 2 de septiembre de 1610, en Thorncombe, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Inmigró a Nantasket Beach, Hull, Suffolk, Masachusets, Estados Unidos en 1630 y vivió en Dorchester, Boston, Suffolk, Masachusets, Estados Unidos en 1630. Murió el 18 de abril de 1643, en Windsor, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultada en South Windsor, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.
